articles.title: The US government warns that Russia state hackers are coming after your router
articles.content: With residential proxies all the rage, CISA urges router users to be vigilant.
articles.titleZh: 美国政府警告称，俄罗斯国家黑客正在追捕您的路由器
articles.contentZh: 由于住宅代理风靡一时， CISA敦促路由器用户保持警惕。

articles.title: Now, defenders are embracing the prompt injection, too
articles.content: "Context bombing" tricks hacking agents into shutting down before they can do harm.
articles.titleZh: 现在，捍卫者也在接受即时注射
articles.contentZh: “情境轰炸”伎俩让代理在造成伤害之前关闭。

articles.title: Patch for Windows Defender 0-day could allow attackers to fill hard disk
articles.content: The feud between NightmareEclipse and Microsoft shows no signs of resolving soon.
articles.titleZh: Windows Defender 0-day修补程序可能允许攻击者填充硬盘
articles.contentZh: NightmareEclipse和微软之间的争执没有很快解决的迹象。

articles.title: Allstate accuses Broadcom of auditing it because it quit VMware, CA
articles.content: Broadcom accuses Allstate of dodging VMware audits.
articles.titleZh: Allstate指责Broadcom对其进行审计，因为它退出了加利福尼亚州的VMware

articles.title: Microsoft tests Windows Search without all the ads and fluff
articles.content: Microsoft is testing a cleaner version of the Windows 11 search menu that strips it of recommended content and ads. In a blog post on Monday, Microsoft announced that it's rolling out the decluttered Search Box to Windows Insiders in the Experimental channel as the company looks to regain trust with users and fix Windows. […]
articles.titleZh: 微软测试Windows搜索没有所有的广告和绒毛
articles.contentZh: 微软正在测试更简洁版本的Windows 11搜索菜单，该菜单删除了推荐的内容和广告。在周一的一篇博客文章中，微软宣布将在实验频道中向Windows Insiders推出经过整理的搜索框，因为该公司希望重新获得用户的信任并修复Windows。[…]

articles.title: OnePlus is reportedly bailing on the US
articles.content: OnePlus and its parent company, Oppo, plan to announce in the coming days that OnePlus brand will be leaving the US and European markets, according to a machine translation of a WinFuture report. Should the exit actually happen, it will mark a conclusion to months of rumors about the future of OnePlus. Android Headlines said […]
articles.titleZh: 据报道， OnePlus正在抛弃美国
articles.contentZh: 根据WinFuture报告的机器翻译， OnePlus及其母公司Oppo计划在未来几天宣布OnePlus品牌将离开美国和欧洲市场。如果退出真的发生，它将标志着几个月来关于一加未来的谣言的结束。Android Headlines表示[…]
